job_title: Engineering Program Manager, OS Build Train Management & Integration
job_nlp_title: Engineering Program Manager, OS Build Train Management & Integration
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, IT Solutions Architect
core_skills: Build, Release Engineering, Release Management, Software Development Life Cycle, Unix programming
skill_match_scores: Build:0.0, Release Engineering:0.0, Release Management:0.5, Software Development Life Cycle:1.0, Unix programming:0.0
must_have_quals: BS/MS EE/CS/CE or equivalent, 3-5+ years experience as a Project or Program Manager
preferred_quals: Build and Release Engineering/Release Management experience highly desirable, Project management experience in software development life cycle highly desirable, Unix programming/scripting experience highly desirable, Self-motivated and proactive with demonstrated creative and critical thinking capabilities, Proven track record of defining processes and executing on them
core_responsibilities: Managing software builds to support releases to beta users and customers, Identifying, escalating, and communicating key issues, Developing strategies for improving processes, Driving resolutions for issues with engineering teams, Helping to manage risk in the endgame leading up to software launch
job_summary: Apple is a leading technology company, and they are seeking an Engineering Program Manager for their OS Build Train Management & Integration team. This role involves coordinating complex build systems, ensuring seamless code integration, and driving continuous improvement initiatives to enhance build reliability and developer experience.
